title: Doff Single Classic Rat Trap
features: INDOOR & OUTDOOR: Doff Classic Rat Trap is suitable for use in the home, garden, shed, workshop or garage. Always protect baits from prevailing weather and to position in protected locations out of the reach of children and pets
FAST & EFFECTIVE: Doff Classic Rat Traps are easy to set up. Due to the nature of the product, wear protective gloves. Finger trap warning, take extra care when handling the trap

DIRECTIONS FOR USE: Wearing gloves, remove the Doff Classic Rat Trap from the packaging. Taking care pull back the spring loaded bar fully. Lock bait into place by inserting the metal bar behind the bait tray. Place trap in desired location, ensure trap faces the wall. Inspect trap daily. Once trap has proven effective, use gloves to remove the mouse and dispose in accordance with the local authority regulations.

HELPING GARDENS GROW: Doff Portland, founded in 1946, is the UK’s largest independent manufacturer of insecticides, weedkillers and garden care products. Garden products are developed and produced from a purpose-built factory in the U.K. Keep On Growing With Doff !
